title: selaginellaceae
intro: The Selaginellaceae rank is a family of plants, specifically a group of vascular plants commonly known as spike mosses or resurrection ferns. This family consists of about 700 species of plants, which are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Selaginellaceae plants are often small, perennial, and have a unique ability to revive from a desiccated state, earning them the nickname "resurrection ferns." They play an important ecological role, often serving as a food source for various animals and providing habitat for microorganisms.
